# Rankday

> Rankday is a 90-day SEO and AI citation agency. We rebuild a business's website, rank it on Google, and get it cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI. One fixed price. Top-3 ranking guarantee on 90% of agreed keywords. No retainer.

Founded by Ijas Abdulla after 16 years of B2B go-to-market work across adtech, proptech, SaaS, and AI.

Pricing: Standard $4,900 USD (AED 18,000 / £3,900). Growth $7,900 USD (AED 29,000 / £6,200).

Markets served: UAE, UK, US, Canada, Australia, Singapore, Ireland, New Zealand. Arabic available in UAE and GCC at no extra cost.

Contact: WhatsApp +971 56 598 1209. Email sales@rank-day.com.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.rank-day.com/): What Rankday does. The 90-day promise.
- [Pricing](https://www.rank-day.com/pricing): Standard and Growth plans. Local pricing for UAE, UK, US.
- [How it works](https://www.rank-day.com/how-it-works): Week-by-week breakdown of the 90-day process.
- [Who it's for](https://www.rank-day.com/who-its-for): Good fit vs not a fit.
- [FAQ](https://www.rank-day.com/faq): Common questions about SEO, AEO, pricing, guarantees.
- [About](https://www.rank-day.com/about): Founder background, beliefs, how Rankday works.

## Educational content

- [What is AEO](https://www.rank-day.com/what-is-aeo): Answer Engine Optimization explained. AEO vs SEO. Why AEO matters.
- [How to get cited by ChatGPT](https://www.rank-day.com/get-cited-by-chatgpt): The 5 signals that drive AI citations across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI.

## Blog

- [Blog index](https://www.rank-day.com/blog): All posts on SEO, AEO, GEO, and web design.
- [SEO vs AEO vs GEO](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/seo-vs-aeo-vs-geo): The full breakdown of three search disciplines.
- [How long does SEO take](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/how-long-does-seo-take): Honest timelines by scenario.
- [How much does SEO cost](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/how-much-does-seo-cost): Every pricing model explained.
- [How to choose an SEO agency](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/how-to-choose-an-seo-agency): 12 questions to ask before signing.
- [What is GEO](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/what-is-geo-generative-engine-optimization): Generative Engine Optimization explained.
- [Will AI replace Google search](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/will-ai-replace-google-search): The honest answer for 2026.
- [Why isn't my website ranking on Google](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/why-isnt-my-website-ranking-on-google): 9 most common reasons.
- [Do I need a new website for SEO](https://www.rank-day.com/blog/do-i-need-a-new-website-for-seo): When to rebuild vs optimise.

- [SEO agency US](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-agency-us): US market, USD pricing, fixed-price alternative to retainer agencies.
- [All locations](https://www.rank-day.com/locations): Full list of markets served.

## Industries served

- [SEO for SaaS](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-saas): Category, comparison, alternative, feature, integration keywords for B2B software.
- [SEO for law firms](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-law-firms): Practice area pages, local SEO, E-E-A-T for legal content.
- [SEO for clinics](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-clinics): Treatment pages, Google Business Profile, healthcare AEO.
- [SEO for plumbers](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-plumbers): Emergency, install, repair, location keyword targeting.
- [SEO for electricians](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-electricians): Fault, install, commercial, location targeting.
- [SEO for contractors](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-contractors): Residential, commercial, specialist project targeting.
- [SEO for interior designers](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-interior-designers): Style, space type, sector targeting.
- [SEO for fit out companies](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-fit-out-companies): Office, retail, hospitality, turnkey targeting.
- [SEO for facilities management](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-facilities-management): Hard and soft services, sector pages.
- [SEO for maid services](https://www.rank-day.com/seo-for-maid-services): Regular cleaning, deep clean, specialist cleaning.
- [All industries](https://www.rank-day.com/industries): Full list of industries served.
